scripts.test:live-smoke: pnpm -F @togetherlink/cli build && TOGETHERLINK_LIVE_SMOKE=1 vitest run --config vitest.config.ts src/LiveSmoke.test.ts
scripts.test:codex: pnpm -F @togetherlink/cli build && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts src/Codex.test.ts
scripts.test:claude: pnpm -F @togetherlink/cli build && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts src/Claude.test.ts
scripts.test:opencode: pnpm -F @togetherlink/cli build && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts src/OpenCode.test.ts
scripts.test:pi: pnpm -F @togetherlink/cli build && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts src/Pi.test.ts
